prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style illustration of an elegant cool-toned young woman, unnamed heroine, seated at a wooden table in a warm sunlit café or conservatory, reading an ornate dark blue hardcover book. She has very long flowing deep violet-black hair with glossy purple highlights, loose strands, and a decorative floral jeweled hairpin with a dark ribbon near one side. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square privacy block with a soft muted purple-to-rose gradient, covering the facial features while leaving the hair, chin area, hand, and outfit visible. She wears a refined Victorian-inspired blouse and dress: a white ruffled high-collar blouse with delicate lace trim, puffed sleeves and gold cuff buttons, a dark navy fitted vest or pinafore, a blue ribbon bow at the collar, and an oval sapphire-like brooch. Her posture is quiet and graceful, one hand holding the open book and the other resting thoughtfully near her lips. The setting is cozy and luminous, with tall wooden window frames on the right, golden afternoon sunlight streaming through, sparkling dust motes, soft lens flare, and blurred flowering garden scenery outside. On the table are exactly four visible still-life objects: one open ornate book in her hands, one floral teacup on a saucer filled with tea, one stack of two closed books with a red book on top and a dark blue book beneath, and one clear glass vase full of pastel hydrangea-like flowers. In the background, include softly blurred shelves, café items, and warm hanging lights. Use highly polished Japanese anime art, delicate linework, painterly lighting, intricate fabric folds, luminous highlights in the hair, shallow depth of field, romantic atmosphere, warm gold and lavender color palette, cinematic composition, 16:9 landscape framing, ultra-detailed, no visible text, no watermark.
